imageA comprehensive e-commerce showcase banner for 'Divinex' computer accessories. A beautiful arrangement of a wireless keyboard, ergonomic mouse, USB-C hub, and a premium desk mat. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_31}} is integrated into the scene. Professional, high-end studio photography with a clean minimalist vibe. Widescreen 16:9 format.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget vertical multi-port docking station. Premium metallic build with a non-slip base. Multiple connection points for dual monitors. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageWhatsApp Image 2026-07-01 at 1.03.27 PM.jpeg
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of Divinex professional noise-cancelling office headphones. Matte black finish with plush leather cushions and a minimalist integrated microphone. The Divinex logo is subtly placed on the ear cups. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
articleQuiret Design Guidelines

Quiret Brand Identity & Design Guidelines

This document outlines the visual language established for the Quiret stationery brand, ensuring a cohesive and premium experience across every section of the website.

1. Visual Personality

The "Artisanal Canvas" theme combines a scholarly, traditional aesthetic with modern minimalist sensibilities. It is inspired by high-end stationery boutiques and academic excellence.

2. Color Palette

The brand uses a sophisticated, earthy palette that feels organic and tactile.

3. Typography

We use a high-contrast serif font to evoke the feeling of printed manuscripts and classic literature.

  • Primary Font: Literata

  • Headings: Literata (Bold) — Used for page titles and section headers to provide a strong, authoritative voice.

  • Body Copy: Literata (Regular) — Used for product descriptions and long-form text for a comfortable, scholarly reading experience.

  • Labels/UI: Literata (Medium/Semi-bold) — Used for buttons, navigation links, and micro-copy.

4. Design Elements

  • Shape & Form: "Round Eight" (8px border radius) — Provides a soft, approachable feel while maintaining professional structure.

  • Imagery: High-end, studio-quality product photography with soft natural lighting and minimalist flat-lay compositions.

  • Separation: Subtle dividers and border-variant lines (border-outline-variant/30) to organize content without clutter.

5. Section-Specific Application

Home & Banners

  • Background: #f7faf9

  • Hero Text: #126b6d (Deep Teal)

  • CTA Buttons: Background #126b6d with white text.

Product Sections (Notebooks, Pens, Charts)

  • Product Tiles: Clean white containers with subtle shadows.

  • Pricing: Bold Teal text to highlight value.

  • Category Labels: Sage Green background with dark text for a "natural" categorization feel.

Educational Resources (Charts & Globes)

  • Typography: Strict use of serif for a traditional classroom aesthetic.

  • Backgrounds: Creamy off-white paper textures.

Crafted for the curious mind.

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget ultra-compact 1TB External SSD. Sleek metallic grey finish, slim profile. Subtle red light activity indicator. Shown with a short USB-C cable on a light grey background (#D1D5DB).
devicesQuiret Footer Component Design
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex premium gaming mouse. Sleek black ergonomic design with vibrant red and tech-blue RGB lighting. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_29}} is clearly visible on the body. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). NO laptops, CPUs, or monitors. High-fidelity, sharp focus.
imageQuiret Circular Logo Final
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a standard 10000mAh power bank for 'PrimeGadget'. Minimalist rectangular design in a matte Silver finish. LED power indicator glowing in tech-blue. Shown with a small red USB cable. Clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageA high-end website banner for 'Quiret' notebooks. A minimalist flat lay on a clean light oak desk featuring a variety of notebooks: spiral bound, hard cover, and soft cover in teal, dusty rose, and sage. One notebook is open to show 'Four-line' ruling. The Quiret logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_147}} is integrated as a physical decal on the cover of a central A4 journal. Elegant serif text overlays the scene: 'The Notebook Collection — From A4 Lab Journals to A5 Pocket Planners'. Soft natural lighting, scholarly atmosphere.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a smart home hub for 'PrimeGadget'. Compact, cylindrical design with a fabric finish and a glowing tech-blue ring on top. Subtle red light reflections. Clean studio setting on a solid light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Power & Charging. A high-capacity solar power bank, a 65W fast wall charger, and a braided USB-C cable coiled neatly. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_375}} is integrated. Vibrant red and tech-blue light accents on the connectors. Widescreen 16:9 format.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget 16-inch display drawing tablet. The screen shows a vibrant digital painting. Minimalist black frame. Subtle tech-blue light reflections on the glass. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget wireless gaming headset. Large over-ear cups, plush memory foam, and a detachable boom mic. Subtle tech-blue LED ring on the cups. Pro gaming audio. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual product photo of a luxury glass dip pen for 'Quiret' with a clear twisted handle. Resting on a textured cream paper. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional-grade 2.0mm clutch pencil for 'Quiret'. Sleek matte black barrel with silver knurled grip and lead grade indicator. Resting on a graphite-smudged sketching paper. Modern, technical aesthetic. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional-grade 2.0mm pencil eraser (pen-style retractable eraser) for 'Quiret'. Sleek matte black barrel with silver accents. Resting on a sketchbook page. Modern, technical aesthetic. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of premium wax crayons for 'Quiret'. Features 12 thick, vibrant crayons in a minimalist paper box. The crayons have clean paper wrappings with the Quiret logo. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget OTG adapter cable. Compact USB-C to USB-A design with a reinforced braided short cord. Subtle red and blue accents. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageA professional e-commerce banner for 'Quiret' writing instruments. A macro composition of pencils (HB, 2B, 4B, 6B) and luxury fountain pens. The Quiret logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_96}} (circular notebook icon next to 'Quiret' text) is placed clearly in the upper left corner. Text overlay: 'Precision & Flow — Professional Graphite, Mechanical Pencils, and Fine Writing Tools'. Clean light-gray background, sharp focus, artisanal feel.
imageA subtle, wide-angle minimalist pattern background for a website footer. The design features a delicate, light-gray line-art pattern of stationery elements: fountain pen nibs, paper clips, open notebooks, and graphite pencils. The background is a very light off-white paper texture (#f7faf9). The illustration is clean, sophisticated, and professional with a lot of whitespace. Scholarly and artisanal aesthetic. High-fidelity.
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'PrimeGadget' Creative Digital Tools. A high-precision 16-inch drawing tablet with a stylus resting on its screen showing a vibrant digital painting. Minimalist black and silver finish. The PrimeGadget logo is included. Soft studio lighting. Widescreen 16:9 format.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a point-and-shoot camera for 'PrimeGadget'. Compact, stylish design in a matte Silver finish. Subtle tech-blue and red light reflections. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). High-quality consumer electronics photography.
imageProfessional category thumbnail for 'Drawing & Sketching'. A curated collection of professional drawing tools: graphite pencils, fine-liners, and a metal ruler on a light gray background. Minimalist, artistic composition. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand palette.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget heavy-duty extension power cable. 4-meter length, sleek black design with a multi-socket surge protector unit at the end. Subtle tech-blue power indicator.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget Full HD (1080p) webcam. Compact black design with a glass lens and universal clip. Subtle tech-blue status LED. Minimalist studio setting, light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional mechanical pencil for 'Quiret'. Slim, matte sage green barrel with silver accents and a fine 0.5mm tip. Minimalist, modern design on a clean desk background. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageA professional e-commerce banner for 'Quiret' writing instruments. A macro composition of pencils (HB, 2B, 4B, 6B) with dark green barrels and gold lettering, alongside sleek matte teal mechanical pencils and luxury fountain pens. The Quiret logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_147}} is integrated as a high-contrast watermark in the corner. Text overlay: 'Precision & Flow — Professional Graphite, Mechanical Pencils, and Fine Writing Tools'. Clean light-gray background, sharp focus, artisanal feel.
imageIndividual product photo of a professional watercolor set for 'Quiret'. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting, elegant metal palette, rich pigments. 1 of 10 variations.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of premium white regular chalk sticks for 'Quiret'. Clean, cylindrical sticks arranged neatly on a dark slate background. Soft natural lighting, minimalist professional stationery aesthetic. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of professional oil pastels for 'Quiret'. Features a box of 10 vibrant, thick pastel sticks with clean white paper wrappings. Minimalist composition on a wooden desk surface. High-end art supply photography, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a small, rustic slate chalkboard in a dark oak frame. A single piece of white chalk and a small felt eraser nearby. Part of a 10-piece 'Quiret' collection.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of 12 professional colored pencils in a sleek metal tin. Arranged by gradient, featuring teal, sage, and rose tones. Part of a 10-piece 'Quiret' collection.

A curated arrangement of a charcoal grey leather-texture desk mat, a high-definition business webcam with a privacy slider, and an adjustable aluminum laptop riser. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_31}} is subtly present. Clean, modern office backdrop with soft bokeh. 16:9 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget smart power strip. Minimalist white design with 4 USB charging ports and 3 AC outlets. Subtle tech-blue status light. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageHigh-quality studio photo of an artist's sketching set: a range of 5 professional graphite pencils with dark green barrels and gold lettering, a metal ruler, and a precision metal sharpener. Arranged neatly on a light gray paper background. Clean, geometric composition. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a premium Quiret 'World Map' chart. Vintage-inspired minimalist aesthetic with deckled edges and muted brand-aligned colors (teal, sage, cream). Rolled slightly at one corner. Professional photography, scholarly mood. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-quality political desk globe for 'Quiret'. Features a detailed map with clear political boundaries and labels. Soft, natural morning light on a clean wooden desk surface. 1:1 aspect ratio. #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand style.

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex 4K professional streaming webcam. Compact metallic body with a large glass lens and a sliding privacy cover. Subtle tech-blue status LED. The brand name 'Divinex' is printed on the front. Minimalist studio setting, light grey background (#D1D5DB). NO laptops, CPUs, or monitors.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a set of 4 premium graphite pencils for 'Quiret' with dark green barrels and gold lettering, clearly labeled with grades: HB, 2B, 4B, 6B. Arranged neatly on a light gray paper background. Soft natural lighting, sharp focus. Minimalist, scholarly aesthetic. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a modern round-dial smartwatch for 'PrimeGadget'. Features a crisp digital display showing a fitness tracking interface. Black silicone strap with a brushed silver case. Vibrant red and blue accents in the UI and subtle light reflections. High-fidelity studio shot.
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Next-Gen Gaming. A dynamic shot of a handheld gaming console with a vibrant screen and a high-performance gaming controller. Features red and blue RGB lighting accents. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_375}} is visible. Professional studio photography. Widescreen 16:9 format.
imageHigh-end, wide-angle banner for an 'Office Supplies' section of a stationery website. A minimalist flat lay of elegant fountain pens, premium planners, and leather-bound diaries on a clean desk surface. Soft, natural morning light. Aesthetic, sophisticated, and professional mood. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand palette.
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Data & Storage. A high-speed 1TB external SSD and a multi-port docking hub arranged neatly. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_31}} is engraved on the metallic surfaces. Sharp focus, clean light grey studio background. Widescreen 16:9 format. Sleek and efficient tech aesthetic.
imageA comprehensive stationery showcase banner for 'Quiret'. A beautiful flat lay containing a journal, gel pens, sharpener, and mini globe. The Quiret logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_96}} (circular notebook icon next to 'Quiret' text) is placed clearly in the upper left corner. Text overlay: 'Crafted for the Curious Mind — Explore the Complete Quiret Collection'. Soft, airy lighting, minimalist aesthetic, professional e-commerce style.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of high-quality over-ear noise-cancelling headphones for 'PrimeGadget'. Matte black finish with plush ear cushions. Elegant studio lighting with vibrant red and tech-blue accents. High-end audio gear style.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget minimalist laptop sleeve. Durable charcoal grey fabric with a soft interior lining. Subtle red zipper accent. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a 2-in-1 pencil sharpener and eraser combo for 'Quiret'. imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a compact wireless optical mouse for 'PrimeGadget'. Ergonomic design in a matte Silver finish with a subtle tech-blue glow from the scroll wheel. Shown on a clean grey desk surface. Professional office computing style.

imageA high-end, wide-angle hero banner for the stationery brand 'Quiret'. The scene is a beautiful, minimalist flat lay on a clean wooden desk, featuring a curated collection of premium stationery: open notebooks showing various paper types (grid, ruled, plain), a set of professional graphite pencils, colorful gel pens, and an elegant fountain pen. imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a premium 1TB external SSD for 'PrimeGadget'. Ultra-compact, slim design with a brushed metallic finish. Shown next to a high-speed USB-C cable. Subtle red and blue highlights. Professional storage solution.

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a portable mini Bluetooth speaker for 'PrimeGadget'. Rugged, cylindrical design in a bold Red color with a premium mesh grille. Modern aesthetic with subtle tech-blue light accents near the controls. High-fidelity, sharp focus.
imageE-commerce product photo of a set of colorful chalk pastels in soft brand-aligned shades (teal, dusty rose, sage, amber). The sticks are arranged by hue on a textured white paper background. Professional lighting, soft shadows, focusing on the chalk texture. 1:1 aspect ratio.

imageA high-end website banner for 'Divinex' Workspace Productivity. A minimalist flat lay featuring a slim silver wireless keyboard, an adjustable aluminum laptop riser, and a business 4K webcam. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_32}} is present. Set on a clean light oak desk with soft morning light. Widescreen 16:9 aspect ratio.
imageA high-quality artistic logo for 'PrimeGadget'. The design features a detailed, hand-sketched illustration of a modern smartphone, wireless earbuds, and a smartwatch with clean line-work and a soft, artisanal texture. Behind the gadgets is an elegant multi-tone watercolor splash using electric blue and vibrant tech-red. The brand name 'PrimeGadget' is written in a sophisticated, integrated serif font. The logo is a PERFECT CIRCLE. Replace the checkered transparency background with a solid, light gray (#f0f0f0) background. High-fidelity and professional.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional artist's palette knife with a dark wood handle and flexible metal blade. Resting on a clean white surface with a small dab of teal paint. Part of a 10-piece 'Quiret' collection.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of 3 novelty shaped erasers for kids for 'Quiret' in charming shapes (like a small star, a cloud, and a pencil). Soft pastel brand colors: dusty rose, sage, and pale amber. Fun, creative, and high-quality. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of 10 professional dual-tip alcohol markers for 'Quiret'. Features a range of artistic skin and nature tones in a clear minimalist case. Sleek design, matte white barrels. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imagePrimeGadget Hatke Logo Concept
imageQuiret Horizontal Brand Logo
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Smartphones. A sleek composition featuring a flagship Gold smartphone and an Emerald Green mid-range Android phone. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_375}} is subtly placed. Background is a clean, dark studio setting with vibrant tech-blue and red light streaks. Widescreen 16:9 format. High-end tech aesthetic.
imageIndividual product photo of a professional metal pencil sharpener. Clean, geometric composition on a wooden desk surface. Sharp focus, soft shadows. High-quality art supply photography.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a premium 1.5-meter Lightning to USB-C cable for 'PrimeGadget'. Braided grey cable with reinforced aluminum connectors featuring red and blue accents. Shown neatly coiled on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). High-quality mobile accessory.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget laptop cooling pad. Sleek black mesh design with dual large silent fans glowing with tech-blue LEDs. Ergonomic tilted angle. Shown on a clean light grey background.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget wide-angle streaming webcam. High-quality build, sleek black finish. Red light reflections on the glass. Shown on a light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual product photo of a classic desk globe for 'Quiret'. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting, antique map, dark wood base. 1 of 10 variations.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-performance gaming controller for 'PrimeGadget'. Ergonomic design in matte black with textured grips. Subtle tech-blue and red LED light bars. Shown on a clean light grey background. High-fidelity gaming accessory.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget desktop soundbar. Low-profile design, metallic grille, and integrated RGB lighting (red/blue). Modern gaming setup aesthetic. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-performance mechanical gaming keyboard for 'PrimeGadget'. Features RGB backlighting with vibrant red and blue light patterns. Sleek black design with tactile keys. Professional, high-fidelity gaming aesthetic.
imageProfessional educational Science Chart (Periodic Table of Elements) for 'Quiret'. Clean, technical layout with precise lines. Minimalist design on textured off-white paper. Half-sheet format. Scholarly, scientific aesthetic. Brand colors: deep teal (#126b6d) and sage green. 3:4 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of professional sketch markers for 'Quiret'. Features 10 dual-tip markers in a clear minimalist case, showing a range of artistic tones. Sleek design, matte barrels. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageHigh-quality hero image for a stationery website. A beautiful, minimalist flat lay of premium journals, fountain pens, and washi tapes on a clean wooden desk. Soft, natural morning light. Aesthetic, creative, and inspiring mood. Colors: teals, pastels, and warm wood tones. High resolution photography.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a rustic wooden slate for 'Quiret'. Dark oak frame with a smooth black writing surface. A single piece of white chalk and a small felt eraser rest nearby. Minimalist, functional design, professional art supply photography. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'PrimeGadget' Smartphones. A sleek composition featuring a flagship Gold smartphone and an Emerald Green mid-range Android phone. The PrimeGadget 'P' monogram logo is subtly placed in the corner. Background is a clean, dark studio setting with vibrant tech-blue and red light streaks. Widescreen 16:9 format. High-end tech aesthetic.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget professional drawing tablet. Sleek black surface with a high-precision stylus resting on it. Subtle tech-blue light on the shortcut keys. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a premium Quiret notebook opened to reveal high-quality 'Single Line' ruled paper. Minimalist composition on a clean wooden desk, soft natural lighting, focus on the clean ruling and paper texture. Artisanal Canvas aesthetic.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex vertical ergonomic wireless mouse. Unique upright design, matte black finish with metallic silver accents. Subtle glowing tech-blue status light. The brand name 'Divinex' is engraved. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). NO laptops, CPUs, or monitors.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a classic chalk slate for 'Quiret'. Rustic dark wood frame with a textured slate surface. A small felt eraser and a set of white chalk sticks are neatly arranged nearby. Scholarly, traditional aesthetic. Warm natural morning light. #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand style.
imageMinimalist product shot of a professional watercolor palette for 'Quiret'. An elegant brushed metal tin opened to reveal 12 vibrant pigment pans in earthy and pastel tones. A single fine-tip brush with a dark wood handle rests alongside it on high-quality watercolor paper. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a colorful kids' smartwatch for 'PrimeGadget'. Durable, bright blue silicone strap with red buttons. Simple digital interface on the screen. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageQuiret Illustrative Logo (Rounded)
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Networking & Connectivity. A set of white mesh Wi-Fi nodes and a futuristic 4-antenna Wi-Fi 6 router. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_30}} is integrated. Dark, sleek studio background with vibrant tech-blue and red light streaks. Widescreen 16:9 format. High-end tech aesthetic.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of PrimeGadget keyboard cleaning gel. Vibrant blue translucent gel in a minimalist jar. Shown next to a mechanical keyboard. Clean tech aesthetic. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual product photo of a rustic slate chalkboard for 'Quiret'. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting, simple wooden frame, white chalk detail. 1 of 10 variations.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of 12 professional colored chalk sticks for 'Quiret'. A palette of soft brand-aligned colors: deep teal, dusty rose, sage green, and warm amber. Arranged in a gradient on a textured cream paper background. High-end art supply photography. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a premium handheld gaming console for 'PrimeGadget'. Sleek ergonomic design in matte black with a vibrant high-definition screen. Subtle tech-blue and red glowing accents around the joysticks. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). High-fidelity studio lighting.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a professional tripod for 'PrimeGadget' cameras. Lightweight carbon-fiber design in matte black with adjustable legs and a precision ball head. Subtle tech-blue accents on the controls. Shown on a clean light grey background. Photography gear.
imageimage.png
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a set of 5 colorful gel pens for 'Quiret' in a clear minimalist case. Pastel brand colors: dusty rose, sage, teal, amber, and cream. Arranged neatly on a light gray paper background. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageHigh-end, wide-angle banner for an 'Art Supplies' section of a stationery website. A beautiful, minimalist flat lay of professional watercolor palettes, high-quality sable brushes, and ceramic brush rests on a light gray paper background. Soft, natural morning light. Aesthetic, professional, and artistic mood. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand palette.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of 3 premium round sable hair brushes with dark wooden handles and gold ferrules. Neatly arranged on a light gray background. Part of a 10-piece 'Quiret' collection.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a smart speaker with voice assistant for 'PrimeGadget'. Compact, spherical design with a premium fabric finish in Grey. A glowing tech-blue ring on top indicating activity. Shown on a modern wooden shelf. High-end smart home audio.
imageQuiret Rectangular Logo
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-performance 12-inch tablet for 'PrimeGadget' with stylus support. Sleek metallic grey finish. Shown with a precision stylus resting on the screen which displays a creative app UI. Subtle tech-blue and red light reflections. clean background.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a premium camera bag for 'PrimeGadget'. Durable, weather-resistant charcoal grey fabric with multiple padded compartments. Subtle tech-blue zippers and a red brand tag. Shown next to a mirrorless camera on a clean light grey background.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget vertical ergonomic mouse. Unique upright design, matte black finish with silver accents. Subtle glowing tech-blue status light. Shown on a light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget 1000VA UPS (uninterruptible power supply). Compact black tower design with a small LCD status display in tech-blue. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex high-definition 4K business webcam. Compact metallic body with a large glass lens and a physical privacy slider. The brand name 'Divinex' is printed on the front. Minimalist studio setting, light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'PrimeGadget' Smart Home Security. A curated arrangement of a sleek video doorbell, a spherical security camera, and a smart home hub. Glowing tech-blue rings and red infra-red indicators. The PrimeGadget logo is present. Modern interior backdrop with soft bokeh. Widescreen 16:9 format.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget multi-purpose tech cleaning kit. Includes brushes, wipes, and a small blower. Arranged neatly in a minimalist pouch. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional watercolor set for 'Quiret'. Features an elegant brushed metal palette opened to reveal vibrant pans of pigment. A single high-quality sable brush rests nearby. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageimg1.1.png
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional-grade kneaded eraser, partially shaped, resting on a graphite-smudged sketching paper. Soft, natural lighting. Part of a 10-piece 'Quiret' collection.
imageIndividual product photo of professional wax crayons for 'Quiret'. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting, vibrant pastel colors, clean paper wrapping. 1 of 10 variations.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of an elegant fountain pen for 'Quiret' with a matte sage green barrel and gold nib. The pen is shown open, resting on textured cream cotton paper. High-end stationery photography, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex adjustable aluminum laptop riser stand. Brushed silver finish, ergonomic design for improved posture. The Divinex logo is visible on the base. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). NO laptops.
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Computing Accessories. A minimalist, high-end flat lay featuring a slim silver wireless keyboard and an ergonomic office mouse on a premium charcoal grey leather desk mat. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_31}} is elegantly integrated. Clean, bright studio lighting with soft shadows. Widescreen 16:9 format. Professional office aesthetic.
imageIndividual product photo of a premium retractable ballpoint pen for 'Quiret' in a deep teal color with silver accents. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting, modern design. 1:1 aspect ratio. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand palette.
imageDivinex Logo
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a rugged kids' tablet for 'PrimeGadget'. Durable, bright Blue protective case with large buttons. The screen shows a simple, colorful kids' interface. Shown on a clean light grey background. Family-friendly tech.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget artist's bundle. Includes an artist glove, screen protector, and replacement nibs neatly arranged. Clean tech aesthetic. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageA professional e-commerce product photo of a luxury stationery gift set. An elegant fountain pen and a premium linen journal are presented in a minimalist gift box with a soft silk ribbon. High-end lighting, clean desk background. A small circular logo is placed in the corner. Consistent with a deep teal and pastel color palette.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget high-performance Thunderbolt 4 dual monitor docking station. Sleek metallic grey finish with multiple ports. Subtle tech-blue status light. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget USB-A to HDMI adapter. Compact design with a reinforced cable. Minimalist Silver finish. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'PrimeGadget' Premium Audio. A minimalist flat lay of high-quality matte black noise-cancelling headphones and ergonomic wireless earbuds in their charging case. The PrimeGadget logo is integrated into the design. Subtle tech-blue LED glow accents. Clean studio lighting on a dark grey surface. Widescreen 16:9 format.

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a 10-inch basic tablet for 'PrimeGadget'. Slim bezels, matte Silver finish. The screen shows a clean education-focused UI with tech-blue and red accents. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). Modern mobile computing.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a minimalist mini desk globe for 'Quiret'. Compact size, featuring a clean matte teal and silver color scheme. Modern, scholarly aesthetic. Resting on a stack of linen-bound notebooks. Soft shadows, sharp focus. 1:1 aspect ratio. #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand style.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-fidelity wired on-ear headphone for 'PrimeGadget'. Matte black finish with a premium braided cable. Red and blue accents on the ear cups. High-fidelity audio aesthetic. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageCategory image for 'Journaling'. An open planner with handwritten notes, washi tape rolls, and stickers. Creative, organized, and inspiring. Warm morning light. Aesthetic flat lay.

imageIndividual product photo of a professional artist's charcoal stick set. Some sticks are partially used, resting on a charcoal-smudged sketch paper. Moody, artistic lighting. High-end art supply photography.
imageA beautiful, wide-angle banner for 'Quiret Classroom Essentials'. The scene features a curated arrangement of classroom tools: a dark oak chalk slate, chalk boxes, and erasers. The Quiret logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_96}} (circular notebook icon next to 'Quiret' text) is placed clearly in the upper left corner. Text overlay: 'Classroom Essentials — Dustless Chalk, Precision Sharpeners, and High-Performance Erasers'. Warm, natural morning light, scholarly aesthetic.

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget high-speed 2-meter HDMI 2.1 cable. Heavy-duty braided design with gold-plated connectors and subtle tech-blue and red highlights. Shown neatly coiled on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget limited edition red gaming mouse pad. Textured surface for high precision. Subtle tech-blue light reflections. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of professional soft chalk pastels for 'Quiret'. Arranged neatly by hue on a textured white paper background. Rich, powdery textures visible. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget professional stylus pen. Sleek metallic finish with a pressure-sensitive nib. Subtle red light ring indicator. Shown at an angle on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a mini portable LED projector for 'PrimeGadget'. Ultra-compact square design in matte black. Glowing lens emitting a soft tech-blue light. Subtle red accents on the controls. Clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a stack of 10 high-quality, deckled-edge heavy watercolor paper sheets. Tied with a sage green silk ribbon. Minimalist, tactile, premium feel. Part of a 10-piece 'Quiret' collection.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional artist's palette knife for 'Quiret'. Flexible metal blade with a dark wood handle. Resting on a clean white surface with a small artistic dab of teal paint nearby. High-end art supply photography. 1:1 aspect ratio.

imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-speed color inkjet printer for 'PrimeGadget'. Compact white design with paper loaded in the tray. Shown with a small stack of vibrant printed photos. Subtle tech-blue power light. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of professional soft chalk pastels for 'Quiret'. A curated set of 12 sticks in a palette of teal, rose, sage, and amber tones. Arranged neatly by hue on a textured white paper background. Rich, powdery textures visible. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional sketching pencil set for 'Quiret'. Features 5 pencils with high-quality graphite cores (HB, 2B, 4B, 6B) and dark green barrels with gold lettering. Arranged neatly on a light gray paper background with a metal sharpener nearby. Scholarly, artisanal aesthetic, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget 7-in-1 USB-C multi-port docking hub. Sleek space grey aluminum finish. Multiple ports visible: HDMI, USB-A, SD slot. Subtle tech-blue status light. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual product photo of a professional artist's pencil for 'Quiret'. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting, variety of graphite grades, elegant barrel colors. 1 of 10 variations.
imageA beautiful, minimalist close-up photo of premium linen-bound notebooks in various pastel colors (teal, dusty rose, sage) stacked on a clean wooden desk. Soft natural lighting. High-end stationery photography style. consistent with #126b6d color palette.
imageProfessional category thumbnail for 'Writing Instruments'. A macro shot of an elegant fountain pen nib touching textured cream-colored paper. Scholarly and sophisticated aesthetic. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand palette.
imageWide banner for 'Journaling Essentials'. A cozy reading nook with an open journal, a steaming cup of coffee, and a fountain pen on a wooden table. Soft natural light through a window. Inspiring and peaceful mood. Professional photography.

imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a high-quality political desk globe for 'Quiret'. Features a detailed map with clear political boundaries, dark wood base, and brushed gold meridian. Elegant, scholarly aesthetic, soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.

imageimage.png
imageIndividual product photo of a premium graphite pencil with gold lettering. Minimalist composition on a light gray paper background. Soft, natural lighting. Professional stationery aesthetic. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand palette.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget high-speed Wi-Fi USB adapter with an external antenna. Sleek black design. Subtle tech-blue status LED. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a compact Wi-Fi range extender for 'PrimeGadget'. White plug-in design with two external antennas. Three signal strength LEDs glowing in tech-blue. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual product photo of a classic desk globe with an antique-style map and a dark wood base. Elegant, scholarly aesthetic. Soft, warm lighting. High-quality product shot.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex high-performance 7-in-1 USB-C multi-port docking hub. Sleek space grey aluminum finish. Multiple ports visible: HDMI, USB-A, SD slot. The brand name 'Divinex' is elegantly etched. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). NO laptops, CPUs, or monitors.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget ultra-slim laptop cooling stand. Metallic grey finish with a single large silent fan. Subtle tech-blue LED glow. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a premium metal single-hole pencil sharpener for 'Quiret'. Brushed silver finish with a high-quality steel blade. Minimalist, geometric design on a clean light gray background. Soft natural lighting, professional art supply photography. Consistent with #126b6d Artisanal Canvas brand style.
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'PrimeGadget' Networking & Connectivity. A set of white mesh Wi-Fi nodes and a futuristic 4-antenna Wi-Fi 6 router. Subtle tech-blue status LEDs. The PrimeGadget logo is placed neatly. Clean, minimalist studio setting. Widescreen 16:9 format.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a dual-band Wi-Fi 6 router for 'PrimeGadget'. Futuristic design with 4 external antennas and a matte black finish. Vibrant tech-blue and red LED status lights. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). High-speed internet gear.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a set of 24 professional colored pencils for 'Quiret'. Arranged in a beautiful color gradient (rainbow spectrum) in a sleek matte-finish tin. High-end stationery photography, minimalist style, soft natural lighting. Consistent with deep teal branding. 1:1 aspect ratio.
articleExtracted text from https://happyartsupplies.in/home
imageA high-end, wide-angle website footer background for a stationery brand called 'Quiret'. The composition features an artistic and minimalist flat lay of premium stationery: delicate line-art of fountain pen nibs, paper clips, and elegant notebooks. The color palette uses Deep Teal (#126B6D), Warm Coral (#FF7F66), and Slate Gray (#747877) on a clean, paper-textured off-white background. Soft, diffused lighting, sophisticated and scholarly aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget wired mechanical keyboard. Sleek black design with tactile keys and vibrant RGB backlighting (red and tech-blue). Minimalist studio setting, light grey background (#D1D5DB). Subtle tech-blue and red light reflections.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a PrimeGadget ergonomic wrist-rest mouse pad. Compact design with a soft gel-filled support. Matte black finish. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageCreative Stationery Illustrative Logo
imagedivinex_resized_180x53.png
imageA professional e-commerce hero banner for 'Divinex' Premium Peripherals. A composition featuring a mechanical office keyboard (no RGB) and a professional webcam. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_31}} is elegantly placed. High-quality materials, matte finishes, and precise build. Widescreen 16:9 format. Sophisticated business tech aesthetic.
imageCategory image for 'Paper'. A stack of high-quality, deckled-edge cotton paper sheets with small dried flowers on top. Organic, tactile texture. Soft, airy lighting. Professional stationery photography.
imageCategory image for 'Notebooks'. A stack of premium linen-bound journals in various pastel colors (teal, dusty rose, sage) on a clean wooden desk. Minimalist, high-end stationery photography style. Soft lighting, consistent with #126b6d palette.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a slim fitness band for 'PrimeGadget'. Narrow OLED display showing fitness stats in tech-blue and red. Black silicone strap. Clean studio lighting on a solid light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageimage.png
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a sleek home theatre soundbar for 'PrimeGadget'. Low-profile design in matte black with a metallic grille. Subtle tech-blue status light. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB).
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a high-capacity 10000mAh solar power bank for 'PrimeGadget'. Rugged design with integrated solar panels. Matte black finish with tech-blue LED indicators. Shown in a clean studio setting.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional 'Dust-Free' eraser for 'Quiret' in a soft sage green color. Minimalist design, clean edges. Resting on a wooden desk next to some graphite pencil shavings. Soft natural lighting. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of professional 'Dustless/Dust-Free' white chalk sticks for 'Quiret'. Sleek, smooth texture, slightly tapered ends. Resting on a clean wooden desk surface near a high-quality felt eraser. Soft natural morning light. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a slim wireless keyboard and mouse combo for 'PrimeGadget'. Minimalist white design with low-profile keys. Subtle tech-blue backlight on the keyboard. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). Modern workspace aesthetic.
imageA high-end, wide-angle hero banner for a stationery brand called 'Quiret'. The scene is a minimalist, professional flat lay on a clean light oak desk. It features a curated collection of premium stationery: a stack of linen-bound journals in teal and dusty rose, an elegant fountain pen with a gold nib, a set of graphite pencils, and rolls of washi tape. Soft, natural morning light creates a calm and scholarly atmosphere. The circular logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_18}} is subtly but clearly integrated into the composition (e.g., as a small watermark in the corner or stamped on a notebook). Professional photography, minimalist aesthetic, high-fidelity.
imageProfessional e-commerce product photo of a Divinex vertical ergonomic wireless mouse. Unique upright design in matte charcoal grey with metallic silver accents. Subtle tech-blue glowing status light. The Divinex logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_29}} is elegantly placed. Shown on a clean light grey background (#D1D5DB). NO laptops or desks.
imageIndividual e-commerce product photo of a professional permanent marker for 'Quiret' with a matte black barrel and a fine bullet tip. Minimalist design, clean lines. Resting on a piece of shipping cardboard. Scholarly and practical aesthetic. 1:1 aspect ratio.
imageA high-fidelity educational banner for 'Quiret Resources'. A composition featuring a vintage-style political desk globe with a dark wood base, a rolled-up world map with deckled edges, and an elegant Alphabet chart. imageA high-quality hand-sketched artistic logo for 'PrimeGadget' featuring a tilted smartphone, wireless earbuds, and a smartwatch. The colors of the watercolor splash behind the gadgets should be very bright, vibrant, and highly saturated—using an electric tech-blue and a bold, fiery red. The gadgets themselves should have clean, detailed line-work with a soft, artisanal texture. The entire image background (both inside and outside the circle) must be a solid, clean light grey (#D1D5DB). Perfect circle composition. No checkered transparency. High-fidelity and professional. Visual style should match the brightness of {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_53}}.

I've generated four additional high-fidelity banners for Divinex, specifically tailored to computer accessories and a professional workspace aesthetic.

New Banner Additions:

  • Professional Peripherals: A high-end composition with a mechanical keyboard and vertical mouse on a premium leather desk mat.
  • Workspace Productivity: A minimalist flat lay featuring a slim wireless keyboard, 4K business webcam, and adjustable riser on an oak desk.
  • Connectivity Essentials: A technical arrangement of a universal docking station, multi-port hub, and reinforced braided cables.
  • Professional Audio: A sophisticated setup with noise-cancelling office headphones and a high-speed external SSD.

All banners maintain the 16:9 widescreen format and integrate the Divinex logo to ensure brand consistency across your site.

How do these new variations look? Would you like me to start applying them to your homepage or a specific category landing page?

Press enter or space to select a node. You can then use the arrow keys to move the node around. Press delete to remove it and escape to cancel.
Press enter or space to select an edge. You can then press delete to remove it or escape to cancel.
